CustomSql.Name: match_events
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
SELECT
  events.payload.event.event_id::VARCHAR as event_id,
  events.payload.event.event_type::VARCHAR as event_type,
  date(timestamp 'epoch' + events.payload.event.event_timestamp::BIGINT * interval '1 second') as event_date,
  events.payload.event.event_data.match_id::VARCHAR as match_id,
  NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.map_id::VARCHAR, '') as map_id,
  NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.match_type::VARCHAR, '') as match_type,
  NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.match_result_type::VARCHAR, '') as match_result,
  NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.spell_id::VARCHAR, '') as spell_used,
  CAST(NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.exp_gained::VARCHAR, '') AS INTEGER) as exp_gained,
  NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.matching_failed_msg::VARCHAR, '') AS matching_failed_msg,
  NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.most_used_spell::VARCHAR, '') AS most_used_spell,
  1 as event_count
FROM "<EVENTS_DATABASE>"."public"."event_data" events
WHERE events.payload.event.event_type::VARCHAR IN ('match_start', 'match_end', 'user_knockout', 'matchmaking_start', 'matchmaking_complete', 'matchmaking_failed')
  AND timestamp 'epoch' + events.payload.event.event_timestamp::BIGINT * interval '1 second' >= dateadd(day, -30, getdate())
